rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE EXPOSURE. DECLARATION OF PORTER INSUFFICIENT AND SPECULATIVE. (CW)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Seeking Surety Bond To Secure Judgment
rulings.Rulings: GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.
DEMURRER TO 15TH, 16TH, 17TH & 18TH CAUSES OF ACTION SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. ALLEGATION OF LATE DISCOVERY MORE FACTS NEED TO BE ALLEGED AS TO WHY APPRAISAL TOOK PLACE SO LATE. (AS(EX))

rulings.Case Title: LOUISE WILTZ et al VS. SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT et al
rulings.Rulings: SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE, NO OPPOSITION FILED.

rulings.Case Title: KATE CAMPBELL et al VS. JOHN HALIN et al
REGENT BUSINESS CENTER SAN FRANCISCO ,LLC VS. WCIII/225 BUSH,LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FOLLOWING CAUSES OF ACTION: 5TH,6TH,7TH,8TH,10TH,11TH, AND 12TH. DEMURRER TO 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT INTERFERENCE SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO DEFENDANT FLYNN, BUT OVERRULED AS TO DEFENDANT WXIII. DEMURRER OVERRULED IN ALL OTHER RESPECTS. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: REGENT BUSINESS CENTER SAN FRANCISCO ,LLC VS. WCIII/225 BUSH,LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES AS TO DEFENDANT WXIII GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND, AS NO FRAUD, OPPRESSION, OR MALICE ALLEGATIONS REMAIN AS TO IT. MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES AS TO DEFENDANT FLYNN DENIED BASED UPON THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION. (JH)
